prompts.title: Amin Ai world
prompts.text:
Prompt:
Ultra-realistic editorial portrait of a confident South Asian man, close-up head-and-shoulders composition, looking slightly upward with a strong, determined expression. He has a clean buzz-cut hairstyle with a high forehead, a neatly groomed full beard and mustache, and wears reflective silver aviator sunglasses with realistic city reflections in the lenses. He is dressed in a premium black textured knitted sweater. Dramatic high-contrast monochrome (black-and-white) portrait with a bold solid red rectangular background behind the subject, surrounded by a clean white minimal canvas. Studio lighting with soft shadows, ultra-sharp facial details, realistic skin texture, HDR, professional fashion photography, luxury branding aesthetic, magazine cover style, minimalist graphic design, centered composition, 85mm lens, f/1.8, shallow depth of field, crisp focus, cinematic color grading, premium poster design, ultra-detailed, photorealistic, 8K, Ultra HD, Adobe Lightroom finish, high-end commercial photography, clean negative space, modern luxury visual identity.

inspirationQuotes.title: স্বপ্ন
inspirationQuotes.text: স্বপ্ন দেখা বন্ধ করো না, কারণ স্বপ্নই তোমাকে এগিয়ে নিয়ে যাবে।

inspirationQuotes.title: পরিশ্রম
inspirationQuotes.text: সাফল্যের কোনো শর্টকাট নেই, শুধু ধারাবাহিক পরিশ্রম আছে।
